verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.body: Please verify your email address by clicking the link below.
verification.expiry: This link expires in 7 days. If you do not verify your account within that time, it will be automatically deleted.
verification.ignore: If you did not create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

password_reset.subject: Reset your password
password_reset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the link below to choose a new one.
password_reset.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.

newsletter.subscribe_body: You have been successfully subscribed to our newsletter. You will now receive updates and news from us.
newsletter.unsubscribe_body: You have been successfully unsubscribed from our newsletter. You will no longer receive updates from us.
